note: Higgsfield Seedance 2.0 + Wan 2.7 generations. Costs in Higgsfield credits.

characters.name: Bart, the Senior Cataloguer
characters.look: Elderly, bespectacled, tweed jacket, wood-paneled editorial office

characters.name: Bertram Whitmore, Founder & Publisher
characters.look: Elderly elegant figure with silk scarf, behind editorial desk or on yacht — the founder archetype. (Higgsfield prompts said "older woman" but visual reads as Bertram per Christopher 2026-05-31.)

characters.name: Hugh (the Field Photojournalist)
characters.look: Green field jacket, industrial smokestacks, golden-hour calls

characters.name: Eliza Hartwell, Staff Writer
characters.look: Young woman at vintage manual typewriter, weary expression — matches Eliza Hartwell on masthead

characters.name: Marvin (the Saturn V kid)
characters.look: Young earnest man with a Saturn V rocket model

characters.name: Constance Pribyl, Director of Editorial Operations
characters.look: Mid-50s Black woman, short natural hair, navy blazer, modern editorial office. Distinct from the elderly silk-scarf Bertram archetype.

characters.name: Theodore ("Teddy"), Junior Cataloguer
characters.look: Mid-20s, wire-rim glasses, knit sweater vest, with a Saturn V model on his desk. Reading from books.

characters.name: Spider, Foreign Correspondent
characters.look: FACELESS. Back-to-camera silhouette in green field jacket + battered fedora. Industrial sites, golden-hour. Per canon: 'No one at the office has met him.'

characters.name: Office Tableaux
characters.look: Empty-room shots, no characters. For 'absence' beats in cartoons.

clips.action: Typing on laptop, deck of yacht
clips.caption: The Director of Editorial Operations, working remotely.

clips.action: On phone at yacht railing, Mediterranean
clips.caption: Constance is on the call. Constance is always on the call.

clips.flagged: PERMANENT: Seedance cannot render stapler use correctly. Action retired from regen list.
PERMANENT: Seedance cannot render stapler use correctly. Action retired from regen list.

clips.action: Slides folder into drawer, slow close
clips.caption: Filed in the green cabinet, third drawer.
The Senior Cataloguer, weighing in.
From the desk of the Senior Cataloguer.
A statement, for the record.
The undersigned wishes to be heard.
On the matter of the catalogue.
Editorial standards have always mattered.
This will be entered into the record.
Field correspondent, calling it in.
Hugh, reporting from the perimeter.
Confirmed: the stack is thiccc.
The handset still works. The railing still holds.
Margie has notes. Margie always has notes.

clips.action: On rotary phone atop a smokestack
clips.caption: Tall things from tall things, an editorial principle.
Sealed. Filed. Acknowledged. Tabled.
Re-feeding the page. The page will be re-read.

clips.action: Glares at folder, sets it down
clips.caption: Filed under: not today.
The Director will see your submission now.
One frame is plenty.

clips.action: Behind desk, calm gravitas, alt take
clips.caption: Editorial gravitas, undated, ongoing.
The Saturn V remains the standard.

clips.action: Holds folder, glares over the top
clips.caption: The Senior Cataloguer has located the file.

clips.action: Single dry raised eyebrow at camera
clips.caption: Margie disagrees, but quietly.
This concludes the bulletin.

clips.action: Signs a document at her modern editorial desk, folds hands, looks at camera
clips.caption: The Director will sign your paperwork now.

clips.action: Reads from a large book at his desk, Saturn V model visible
clips.caption: The Junior Cataloguer has located a citation.

clips.action: Composes a memo at his portable typewriter on the deck of the Margaret IV
clips.caption: The Publisher, at sea, drafting.

clips.action: Back-to-camera figure on industrial railing, holding rotary handset, gesturing at smokestacks
clips.caption: Filed from somewhere. The dateline says less than you think.

clips.action: Empty desk, phone receiver off the hook, late afternoon light
clips.caption: Someone has not returned to the desk.

retired_actions: stapling (any character) - Seedance / Wan 2.7 fail mode on fine tool manipulation, 3 takes wasted
